name: Al Qudra Cycling Track
snippet: Want to discover the desert by cycling? Head to the Al Qudra Cycle Path . Here you'll find an 86km cycling track. Learn more about Al Qudra on Visit Dubai.

name: Nad Al Sheba Cycle Park | Dubai's Cycling Tracks
snippet: Open 24 hours and free to use for all ages and abilities, the Nad Al Sheba Cycle Park has four, six and eight-kilometre routes and even a track for children.
